ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Example of data in scope for a single Trade Surveillance Analyst: month/year of birth 06/1987, ordinarily based at the Larksbury office, company laptop serial NQH-LPT-LE-437A, payroll reference NQ-008721, internal user ID u12987, access fob LE-16-204, role mailbox dealsurveillance@northquay-plc.example, and expense card suffix 6621

must_detect.matched_text:
Northquay Holdings plc – Market Conduct Privacy and Retention Notice (UK)
We process personal data under the UK GDPR for employees, workers and contractors supporting our UK issuer obligations and market conduct controls.
Categories processed include HR enrolment data, role-based contact points, security logs, and trade surveillance artefacts generated to comply with UK MAR-aligned rules.
In particular, our insider-list and restricted-list workflows capture only business contact fields and timestamps; sample screen prints used in training are redacted and use dummy identifiers.
Example of data in scope for a single Trade Surveillance Analyst: month/year of birth 06/1987, ordinarily based at the Larksbury office, company laptop serial NQH-LPT-LE-437A, payroll reference NQ-008721, internal user ID u12987, access fob LE-16-204, role mailbox dealsurveillance@northquay-plc.example, and expense card suffix 6621.
Generic forms may display labels such as “Name”, “DD/MM/YYYY”, “Address line 1”, or “Account number #### #### #### ####”; these are templates and not records of a specific person.
References to instruments in surveillance scenarios use fabricated codes (e.g., ZZ00NQ000000) and publicly announced events; training materials avoid material non-public information and stale examples are clearly marked.
Our lawful bases include legal obligation for issuer record-keeping and legitimate interests in preventing market abuse; we do not rely on consent for monitoring required by regulation.
Where required by law, we may disclose records to the Britanic Markets Authority or a UK regulated market operator; any transfer outside the UK uses standard contractual safeguards and proportional redactions.

must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: Template label example; not a specific person’s data

Masked template; not an actual account number

uncertain.matched_text: Retention: insider list entries are retained for five years from list closure; surveillance alerts are retained for up to three years unless escalated; device telemetry rolls off after ninety days
uncertain.reason: Retention details are privacy-relevant but there is no explicit allowed rule name for retention markers.

uncertain.matched_text: Data subject rights (access, rectification, restriction, objection) can be exercised by contacting privacyoffice@northquay-plc.example or our helpline on 0800 000 9999; identity will be verified using neutral questions
uncertain.reason: DSAR/rights invocation is legally relevant but not mapped to an allowed rule name.
Restricted lists are market-compliance sensitive, but there is no explicit allowed rule for restricted lists.
Last-4 of a card can be linkable PII but there is no specific allowed rule for card suffixes.
